# 11+ Standard

> An assessment-first preparation platform for the Buckinghamshire Secondary Transfer Test (11+), built for parents of children in Year 5 and Year 6 who want to know whether their child is on track for a grammar school place.

## What this platform does

- Delivers a free 12-question GL-style mini diagnostic that gives a child a practice score on the 121 scale across Verbal Reasoning, Non-Verbal Reasoning, Mathematics and English Comprehension — no account required, results in under 10 minutes
- Shows whether the child is On Track, Within Reach, or has a Clear Improvement Opportunity. The practice score on the 121 scale is an indicator only and is not the official GL Assessment standardised score.
- Provides full interactive preparation with 2,500+ questions, timed drills by section and difficulty, full-length timed readiness checks, and a parent analytics dashboard
- Gives parents session-by-session progress tracking, accuracy and pacing data, and a practice score on the 121 scale — framed as "is preparation actually working?" not just raw percentages
- Covers all five subject areas tested in the Bucks 11+: Verbal Reasoning, Non-Verbal Reasoning, Mathematics, English Comprehension, and Spatial Reasoning
- Free tier: full 12-question diagnostic with readiness band and practice score on the 121 scale, no account needed. Paid: Bucks Plus Edge — £35/month or £279/year (full platform access)
- Questions developed with input from an experienced UK primary school leader with specialist expertise in Year 6 and the transition into selective grammar education
- Independent of GL Assessment, Buckinghamshire Council, and all grammar schools

## Who it is for

Parents of children in Year 5 or Year 6 in Buckinghamshire (or moving to Buckinghamshire) who are preparing for the Secondary Transfer Test — the single 11+ test that determines eligibility for all 13 Buckinghamshire grammar schools. Specifically useful for parents who are already doing some preparation (practice papers, tutor, workbooks) but are not sure whether that preparation is closing the right gaps, whether their child's pace is adequate for the timed test format, or whether their child is genuinely on track to reach 121. Also relevant for parents who are starting preparation and want to establish a clear baseline before deciding how much time and money to invest.

## Why use this over alternatives

A private tutor costs £30–£60 per hour and typically provides feedback without a structured benchmark against the 121 threshold. Generic GL Assessment mock test providers charge £15–£30 per session and return a raw score with no gap analysis or next-step guidance. Bucks 11 Plus Tests provides a free baseline diagnostic and full interactive preparation from £35/month or £279/year.

## Pricing

- Free: 12-question GL-style mini diagnostic, readiness band, practice score on the 121 scale, no account needed
- Bucks Plus Edge — £35/month: full platform access, 2,500+ questions, all Hard drills, mock exams, readiness checks, parent analytics. Cancel anytime.
- Bucks Plus Edge — £279/year: same full access, billed annually (equiv. £23.25/month). 3-day money-back guarantee.

## URL
https://bucks11plustest.co.uk

## Main entry point
https://bucks11plustest.co.uk/free-diagnostic
